arts.ttl: Merson says: Man City now fully aware of threat posed by Arsenal

arts.ttl: Why Erling Haaland isn’t playing for Man City against Watford tonight
arts.sum: Haaland, who has scored 10 goals in just five Premier League matches, won’t be in the squad for the Carabao Cup third-round clash

arts.ttl: Rodri pictured in Spain for reported ACL tests
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has been pictured arriving in Spain reportedly ahead of tests on a right knee injury sustained against Arsenal in the English Premier League at the weekend.

arts.ttl: How Manchester City could replace injured Rodri
arts.sum: The Spain midfielder could be facing an extended spell on the sidelines after suffering a knee injury against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Leandro Trossard will NOT be banned from Premier League action for Arsenal despite his red card against Man City
arts.sum: The forward was dismissed with a second yellow card eight minutes into first-half stoppage time after he fouled Bernardo Silva and hoofed the ball away.

arts.ttl: Man City injury news: Rodri travels to Barcelona for further tests 'amid ACL fears'
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri travels to Barcelona for further tests on the knee injury that he sustained against Arsenal on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Rodri injury latest: Man City star travels to Spain for further tests on knee problem feared season-ending
arts.sum: Influential midfielder is undergoing examination in Barcelona having believed to have suffered a serious ACL issue against Arsenal
